name: ethos
description: Use Ethos as a remote MCP surface for GTM prospecting, enrichment, tables, agent columns, and campaigns without local CLI setup.

interface.shortDescription: GTM prospecting, enrichment, tables, agent columns, and campaigns.
interface.longDescription: Use Ethos through a remote OAuth-backed MCP server. Find prospects, upload company lists, source people, enrich contact info, create agent columns, and add leads to campaigns without installing the Ethos CLI.
defaultPrompt: Use Ethos to find RevOps leaders at US B2B SaaS companies.
Use Ethos to enrich work emails for a people table.
Use Ethos to add leads from a people table to a campaign.
